team_news: Germany are described as relying on Manuel Neuer, Joshua Kimmich, Florian Wirtz and Jamal Musiala; Musiala fitness is a monitoring point.
Curacao make their World Cup debut under Dick Advocaat, with Leandro/Juninho Bacuna and Gervane Kastaneer noted as key pieces.
Curacao's final qualifying defensive record is a reason not to overstate handicap confidence.
weather_venue: Houston sources flag hot, humid conditions and possible Gulf moisture; exact hourly stadium weather was not confirmed.
NRG Stadium/Houston Stadium is an indoor/retractable-roof venue, reducing direct heat/wind impact if closed.
historical_structural: Germany are four-time World Cup winners but have recent group-stage disappointment to correct.
Curacao are a debutant and the smallest nation to qualify, creating a major experience and depth gap.
First group match: motivation is clear for both; no qualification math yet.

risks: Verified Sporttery prices and official single-match status unavailable.

post_match_review.variance_note: Germany win direction was correct, but the scoreline was much wider than projected after Curacao's brief equalizer did not slow Germany's pressure.
